channel.title: Llms on Alessio Miaschi
channel.description: Recent content in Llms on Alessio Miaschi

item.title: NEOIT5 App
item.description: Interactive demo to explore the capabilites of an LLM trained on three core lexical tasks: Reverse Dictionary (generating words from definitions), Definition Modeling (producing dictionary-style definitions), and Exemplification Modeling (creating contextual usage examples)

item.title: Contextualized Counterspeech - LLaMA 2 Models
item.description: Suite of LLaMA-2 models fine-tuned for the personalized generation of counter-narratives in response to toxic comments posted on Reddit.

item.title: LLM Profiling Data
item.description: Data associated with the paper ‘Evaluating Large Language Models via Linguistic Profiling’
